mapper.select: SELECT LEVEL, DEPTNO, UP_CODE, DEPT_NAME --, LPAD(' ', (LEVEL-1) * 2) || DEPT_NAME AS DEPT_NAME , DEPT_ORDER, MINLEVELNO, MANAGER , HOSTNAME, ALIAS_NAME, DEPT_GUBUN, BRANCH_YN , CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF AS IS_LEAF , LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(DEPT_NAME, ' > '), ' > ') AS DEPT_PATH FROM DEPT WHERE 1 = 1 START WITH DEPTNO = '0000' CONNECT BY PRIOR DEPTNO = UP_CODE ORDER SIBLINGS BY DEPT_ORDER
SELECT DEPTNO, UP_CODE, DEPT_NAME, DEPT_GUBUN, MINLEVELNO FROM DEPT WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY DEPTNO, DEPT_ORDER
mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO DEPT t USING ( SELECT #{deptno, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DEPTNO, #{upCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS UP_CODE, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DEPT_NAME, #{deptOrder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DEPT_ORDER, #{minlevelno, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS MINLEVELNO, #{manager, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS MANAGER, #{hostname, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS HOSTNAME, #{aliasName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS ALIAS_NAME, #{deptGubun, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DEPT_GUBUN, #{branchYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS BRANCH_YN FROM dual ) s ON (t.DEPTNO = s.DEPTNO)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.UP_CODE = s.UP_CODE, t.DEPT_NAME = s.DEPT_NAME, t.DEPT_ORDER = s.DEPT_ORDER, t.MINLEVELNO = s.MINLEVELNO, t.MANAGER = s.MANAGER, t.HOSTNAME = s.HOSTNAME, t.ALIAS_NAME = s.ALIAS_NAME, t.DEPT_GUBUN = s.DEPT_GUBUN, t.BRANCH_YN = s.BRANCH_YN
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( DEPTNO, UP_CODE, DEPT_NAME, DEPT_ORDER, MINLEVELNO, MANAGER, HOSTNAME, ALIAS_NAME, DEPT_GUBUN, REG_DATE, BRANCH_YN ) VALUES ( s.DEPTNO, s.UP_CODE, s.DEPT_NAME, s.DEPT_ORDER, s.MINLEVELNO, s.MANAGER, s.HOSTNAME, s.ALIAS_NAME, s.DEPT_GUBUN, SYSDATE, s.BRANCH_YN )
mapper.select: SELECT MENU_CODE, MENU_NO FROM MENU_AUTH WHERE DEPTNO = #{deptno} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT d.DEPTNO , d.DEPT_NAME , ml_top.MENU_NAME AS TOP_MENU_NAME , ml.MENU_NAME , ml.MENU_CODE , ml.MENU_NO FROM DEPT d JOIN MENU_AUTH ma ON ma.DEPTNO = d.DEPTNO AND ma.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN MENU_LIST ml ON ml.MENU_CODE = ma.MENU_CODE AND ml.MENU_NO = ma.MENU_NO JOIN MENU_LIST ml_top ON ml_top.MENU_NO = ml.TOP_NO AND ml_top.UP_MENU_NO IS NULL WHERE 1 = 1
AND d.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{deptName} || '%'
AND ml.MENU_NAME LIKE '%' || #{menuName} || '%'
ORDER BY d.DEPTNO, ml.MENU_CODE, ml.MENU_NO
